title: David x Careerspan

summary.action_items:
**Vrijen Attawar**
Contact Logan to confirm chat scheduling and follow-up logistics (00:38)
Send David public repository with Zoe personas and basic file system setup to facilitate onboarding (15:30)
Coordinate with David to schedule next conversation for further Zoe integration support (16:35)

**David Speigel**
Join Zoe Discord community and troubleshoot account login to gain platform access (06:40)
Review sent Zoe public repo personas and file system setup to get started with Zoe tooling (15:42)
Begin integration project to connect Zoe with Fathom call recording transcripts using Google Flash model (15:57)
summary.shorthand_bullet:
**Activated career span processing system covering broad strategy** (00:00 - 00:00)
 **Interest in VC and coordinating with Logan about chat timings; Logan permits past noon chat** (00:38 - 05:04)
 **David subscribed to Zoe ($9 plan) but not yet active on Discord or deeply exploring tool** (01:07 - 01:07)
 **Walkthrough of Fathom API/webhook integration to automate transcript aggregation** (01:55 - 01:55)
 **Live demo of Zoe platform, Claude code terminal agent for file system and task automation** (04:11 - 04:11)
 **David struggles with Discord login, resolves with downloading app and re-verification** (06:40 - 06:40)
 **Discussion on AI tool costs, credit system, and coverage of Gemini, Claude in Zoe subscription** (05:22 - 06:29)
 **Differentiation between Lovable low-code builder and Claude code terminal agent described** (09:33 - 11:10)
 **Demonstration of enabling Claude code to understand and operate on file system tasks** (11:10 - 15:30)
 **Plan to share public repo with personas and base Zoe file system for David’s onboarding** (15:30 - 15:30)
 **David commits to start Zoe/Fathom integration project using Google Flash model as baseline** (15:57 - 15:57)
 **Scheduled follow-up conversation and ongoing support planned** (16:35 - 16:39)
summary.overview:
- **Call Transcript Automation:** Team decided to automate transcript aggregation to enhance workflow and reduce manual work.

- **Fathom Integration Setup:** Quick implementation using API/webhook recommended to bypass manual copy, improving productivity.

- **Zoe Subscription Details:** $9/month plan offers access to multiple AI engines with credit accumulation for compute resources.

- **Onboarding Issues:** David faced challenges with Discord and Zoe login; team agreed to assist in troubleshooting and setup.

- **Claude Code Capabilities:** Integrated AI agent in Zoe to assist coding and streamline development processes with local context.

- **Next Steps Planned:** Commitments made for resource sharing, follow-up sessions, and collaboration on Fathom integration for efficient learning.
